entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The agricultural crop being studied for aflatoxin contamination in Karnataka, India

entities.name: TUMKUR DISTRICT
entities.description: The specific district in Karnataka, India, where the research was conducted

entities.name: KARNATAKA
entities.description: The state in India where the study took place

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the research was conducted

entities.name: NATIONAL AGRICULTURAL TECHNOLOGY PROJECT
entities.description: The project under which the studies on aflatoxin contamination in groundnut were conducted

entities.name: AFLATOXIN CONTAMINATION
entities.description: The presence of toxic aflatoxins in groundnut seeds or the environment

entities.name: SURVEY OF AFLATOXIN AWARENESS
entities.description: A research method used to evaluate the level of awareness regarding aflatoxins among farmers, traders, and oil millers

entities.name: POD AND SOIL SAMPLING
entities.description: A sampling method used to investigate seed infection and soil contamination by Aspergillus flavus

entities.name: SEED INFECTION
entities.description: The infection of groundnut seeds by the fungus Aspergillus flavus

entities.name: SOIL CONTAMINATION
entities.description: The presence of Aspergillus flavus in the soil

entities.name: ASPERGILLUS FLAVUS
entities.description: The fungus responsible for causing seed infection, soil contamination, and producing aflatoxins

entities.name: DETERMINATION OF AFLATOXIN CONTAMINATION
entities.description: A method used to measure the level of aflatoxin contamination under market conditions

entities.name: MARKET CONDITIONS
entities.description: The environmental and commercial conditions under which aflatoxin contamination was determined
